Email marketing and transactional email: Email marketing and transactional email automation with INBOX (useinbox.com). Manage contacts, lists, campaigns, and react to delivery events.
The email address you sign in to INBOX w: The email address you sign in to INBOX with.
Connect your INBOX account by entering t:
Connect your INBOX account by entering the email and password you use to sign in at https://app.useinbox.com.

Each request exchanges these credentials for a short-lived bearer token, so make sure the credentials belong to a user that has access to the API.
Adds a single contact to an INBOX contac: Adds a single contact to an INBOX contact list. Creates the contact if the email is new, otherwise updates the existing contact and ensures it is part of the list.
Creates a new contact list in INBOX wher: Creates a new contact list in INBOX where you can later add contacts.
Updates an existing INBOX contact. You c: Updates an existing INBOX contact. You can add or replace tags and set custom field values.
Changes a contact status to Unsubscribed: Changes a contact status to Unsubscribed so they stop receiving campaigns from INBOX. You can also mark them as Hard Bounce or Spam Reported.
Schedules an INBOX campaign that sends a: Schedules an INBOX campaign that sends a saved newsletter to one or more contact lists.
Sends a one-off transactional email thro: Sends a one-off transactional email through INBOX Notify (e.g. password reset, receipt, welcome).
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Subject: Subject
Select the INBOX contact list. Lists are: Select the INBOX contact list. Lists are managed under Contacts > Lists in your dashboard.
Email address of the contact to add (e.g: Email address of the contact to add (e.g. jane@example.com).
Name of the new contact list (e.g. \"New: Name of the new contact list (e.g. "Newsletter Subscribers").
Optional. Place the list inside this gro: Optional. Place the list inside this group to keep things organised. Leave empty to keep it ungrouped.
Legal basis for collecting these contact: Legal basis for collecting these contacts. Pick the regulation your audience is covered by; this affects what consent text INBOX shows.
Select the contact to update. Contacts a: Select the contact to update. Contacts are listed under Contacts in your INBOX dashboard.
Optional. Tags to attach to the contact: Optional. Tags to attach to the contact (e.g. "vip", "newsletter"). Leave empty to keep existing tags.
The status to apply to the contact.
The verified sender the campaign emails: The verified sender the campaign emails are sent from. Add senders under Settings > Senders in INBOX.
The ID of the saved newsletter to send i: The ID of the saved newsletter to send in the campaign. You can find newsletter IDs by using the "List Newsletters" action or by looking at the URL when editing a newsletter in INBOX (e.g. https://app.inboxroad.com/newsletters/12345/edit, where 12345 is the newsletter ID).
Select one or more INBOX contact lists. Lists are managed under Contacts > Lists in your dashboard.
Optional. When to send the campaign. Lea: Optional. When to send the campaign. Leave empty to use INBOX defaults. Use a future date/time.
If enabled, INBOX emails you when the ca: If enabled, INBOX emails you when the campaign starts sending.
If enabled, INBOX emails you when the campaign finishes sending.
The display name shown to recipients (e.g. "Acme Support").
Verified sender email. The domain must a: Verified sender email. The domain must already be authenticated in INBOX Notify, otherwise the email will be rejected.
The HTML body of the email. You can refe: The HTML body of the email. You can reference INBOX merge fields with `#fieldName#` and provide values in Custom Fields below.
Optional. Key-value pairs that replace `: Optional. Key-value pairs that replace `#key#` placeholders in your HTML (e.g. `{ "name": "Jane", "code": "12345" }`).
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: 黑色
Triggers when a new contact is added to: Triggers when a new contact is added to your INBOX account (through a form, manual entry, import, or API).
Triggers when a new campaign is created: Triggers when a new campaign is created in your INBOX account.
Triggers when a transactional email perm: Triggers when a transactional email permanently bounces (hard bounce) — the recipient address does not exist or is blocked.
Triggers when a recipient marks a transa: Triggers when a recipient marks a transactional email as spam in their inbox.
Triggers each time a transactional email: Triggers each time a transactional email is opened by the recipient. Fires on every open (not unique).
Triggers when a recipient clicks a track: Triggers when a recipient clicks a tracked link inside a transactional email.
